# fleetdm_mdm_summary (Data Source)

Fetches the MDM enrollment summary from FleetDM.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `platform` (String) Filter by platform (darwin, windows, ios, ipados, android). Optional.
- `team_id` (Number) Filter by team ID. Optional.

### Read-Only

- `counts_updated_at` (String) When the counts were last updated.
- `enrolled_automated_hosts_count` (Number) Number of hosts enrolled automatically (DEP/ABM).
- `enrolled_manual_hosts_count` (Number) Number of hosts enrolled manually.
- `enrolled_personal_hosts_count` (Number) Number of hosts enrolled as personal devices.
- `hosts_count` (Number) Total number of hosts.
- `id` (String) Placeholder identifier for the data source.
- `mdm_solutions` (Attributes List) List of MDM solutions and host counts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--mdm_solutions))
- `pending_hosts_count` (Number) Number of hosts pending enrollment.
- `unenrolled_hosts_count` (Number) Number of unenrolled hosts.

<a id="nestedatt--mdm_solutions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `mdm_solutions`

Read-Only:

- `hosts_count` (Number) Number of hosts using this MDM solution.
- `id` (Number) The MDM solution ID.
- `name` (String) The MDM solution name.
- `server_url` (String) The MDM server URL.
